## v3.2.5 — metadata, discovery, and company-led Cloud routing
Align public metadata, release proof, and hosted buyer-routing around the current company-led Slack MCP Cloud surface.

### Improved
- aligned `package.json`, `package-lock.json`, `server.json`, and `glama.json` on `3.2.5`
- refreshed public README, Pages, and docs so Cloud routing points to pricing, workflows, Gemini CLI, readiness, procurement, deployment review, and support
- added a checked distribution ledger for MCP Registry, Glama, mcp.so, PulseMCP, and Smithery
- tightened release-health and runbook guidance around hosted funnel visibility plus Search Console/Bing reconciliation

### Compatibility
- No MCP tool or transport schema changes

### Verify
```bash
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --version
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --setup
npx -y @jtalk22/slack-mcp@latest --status
node scripts/check-version-parity.js --allow-propagation
```

### Support
- Self-host bugs and docs fixes: GitHub issues with exact version, runtime mode, and error output
- Managed rollout or Cloud support: `https://mcp.revasserlabs.com/deployment?utm_source=github&utm_medium=release_notes&utm_campaign=slack_mcp_cloud` and `https://mcp.revasserlabs.com/support?utm_source=github&utm_medium=release_notes&utm_campaign=slack_mcp_cloud`

Operated by Revasser. Keep GitHub focused on self-host proof and release integrity; keep hosted rollout, billing, procurement, and Cloud support on `https://mcp.revasserlabs.com`.
